source.body_text_sample:
Skip to content
EMPLOYEE PORTAL
SEARCH
FR
THE CLUB MEMBERSHIP CATERING AND EVENTS CONTACT NEWS MEMBER LOGIN
CONTACT
EMPLOYMENT

We are seeking dynamic and self-motivated individuals with a friendly and outgoing personality for our Food & Beverage departments. If you are interested in employment opportunities at the Rideau Club, you are invited to contact us for information about positions available, the application process and for any other information.

We welcome applications for the following positions: Food Services Leads and Floor Managers, ,Bartenders, Banquet Servers, Line Cooks, and Dishwashers

Please forward your résumé to Jacquelyn Hazlett, Payroll and HR Administrator at hazlettj@rideauclub.ca or send it by mail to the Rideau Club, Attention: Jacquelyn Hazlett.

We are an equal opportunity employer and welcome applications from all qualified candidates. Personal data collected will be handled confidentially by authorized personnel for recruitment-related purposes within the Rideau Club.

HOURS OF
OPERATION

The Rideau Club will be closed for dinner each Monday and Friday beginning on Friday, July 3. Dinners will resume each weeknight on Monday, September 14.

The Club will close for its annual summer break on Friday, July 17 at 2:30 p.m., reopening for breakfast on Monday, August 17.

REGULAR DINING HOURS

Monday to Friday, inclusive

Breakfast: 7:30 a.m. – 9:00 a.m.
Lunch: 11:30 a.m. – 2:30 p.m.
Dinner: 5:00 p.m. – 9:00 p.m.

Saturday and Sunday
Open for private
